crs.title: Mandatory Evidence Received check before recalculation
crs.useCase: Before recalculating income, caseworker must confirm evidence has been received.

crs.title: Intelligent Arrears
crs.useCase: When invalid NINO is entered, Siebel now shows a clearer validation message.
guideSteps: Read the new validation message if NINO is invalid.

crs.title: Recalculate button disabled until checks complete
crs.useCase: Recalculate button remains disabled until mandatory checks are completed.
guideSteps: Recalculate button becomes enabled only after checks pass.
